name: First State Bank
description_short: Stuart, IA's First State Bank branch at 215 N Division St offers in-person banking services to the local community.
description_long:
First State Bank is located at 215 N Division St in downtown Stuart, IA. This branch serves as a full-service banking location for Stuart residents and visitors to the area. Hours of operation are available directly from the branch.

At this Stuart location, First State Bank offers standard banking services including account openings, deposits, withdrawals, and financial consultations. Contact the branch directly at their Stuart office to discuss specific services, loan products, or business banking options.

For Stuart residents managing personal or business finances, this Division Street branch provides convenient access to banking services with local customer service. Bring a valid government-issued ID for account matters. The Stuart branch is part of First State Bank's service to Iowa communities.
services: Online banking platform with login and enrollment
Consumer loans with loan officer consultation
pros: Established institution operating since 1944 with demonstrated stability and regulatory compliance
Multiple physical branch locations (Stuart, Dexter, Redfield, Stuart Express) for in-person service
Dedicated loan officers available for consumer loan consultations at multiple locations
Comprehensive digital banking options including online banking, mobile app, bill pay, and telebanking
Full range of traditional banking products including checking, savings, CDs, credit cards, and loans
Community-focused institution with deep local roots and personalized banking relationships
Offers both consumer loans and mortgage services through their loan officer network
cons: Limited geographic availability—only serves Stuart, Dexter, and Redfield, Iowa areas; inaccessible to most customers
Website provides minimal information about rates, fees, or competitive offerings compared to other banks
No indication of specialized services like investment advisory, wealth management, or business banking prominence
Limited online presence and marketing compared to regional or national competitors
No transparency provided about APRs, minimum deposits, or specific loan terms on public website
best_for: Iowa residents in Stuart, Dexter, or Redfield seeking traditional community banking with local loan officers
Customers preferring face-to-face banking relationships and local decision-making over digital-only banks
Small business owners and farmers in the service area seeking relationship-based lending
Consumers seeking CD products and traditional savings vehicles with established community bank
diagnosis: First State Bank is best for Iowa residents in the Stuart, Dexter, or Redfield area who value community banking relationships and local service over digital convenience or competitive rates. The main caveat is severe geographic limitation—this bank is only accessible to customers in specific Iowa communities, making it unsuitable for remote banking or customers outside their service territory.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: First State Bank at 215 N Division St, Stuart, IA. Full-service banking branch for local residents and small businesses.
